creator: Wolff (Raphael G.) Studios, Inc.
description: Traces the birth of the 1949 Ford from the drawing board to the roads of the world, showing different stages of automobile design and manufacturing. Run time should be 27:17, but these files only have the first 12 minutes or so.
subject: Automobiles: Design and manufacturing

Occupations: Automobile manufacturing
title: Human Bridge, The
